title: Downtime Disrupts Momentum
text: In many classrooms, valuable minutes are lost while students wait for direction, repeat questions, or pause between lab steps.

title: Limited Step-Level Visibility
text: Teachers often cannot see, in real time, who is progressing, who is stuck, and which step is creating friction. That visibility gap drives downtime and uneven support.

title: What Was Built
text: LabFlow was built to close that gap with one connected workflow for planning, student work, and live instructional awareness.

title: Value Proposition
text: It gives teachers and administrators faster access to student steps, data, and trends, so class time is used for coaching and learning instead of manual tracking.

title: Teacher Lab Builder
text: Teachers can generate a full lab draft, refine instructions, and publish with clear objectives, materials, and grading criteria in one flow.

title: Student Pre-Lab Workflow
text: Students open assigned labs, complete pre-lab thinking, and move through structured steps that build reasoning through guided data collection.

title: Data Entry and Reflection
text: At each step, students record observations and reflect on evidence. Work is continuously captured, making progress visible without stopping instruction.

title: When a Student Gets Stuck
text: When a student gets stuck, guided help appears in context, and the teacher can still stay in control of instructional decisions.

title: Live Monitor and Grouping
text: From the live monitor, teachers can see status by student and by step, then quickly group learners for targeted support.

title: Analytics for Leaders
text: Administrators and instructional teams can review classroom analytics to spot patterns and support coaching conversations.

title: 30-Day Pilot Plan
text: A practical adoption plan starts with a 30-day pilot in two to three high school or higher classes that rely on step-based, data-rich work. Track completion rate, help-response time, and grading time saved.

title: Try the Demo Now
text: Create a more responsive classroom environment that values everyone’s time. Try the demo now at slash demo slash try.
